channel.title: Iced on Hart Hoover
channel.description: Recent content in Iced on Hart Hoover

item.title: Making Iced Coffee
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: As the wind picks up and the evening gets colder, I decided to go against the grain and make some cold brew. Some have the patience to put water in grounds and let that mess soak for a few hours (or longer). I have no such patience. I pulled out my trusty Chemex, added ice, and got to work. The purist would say “You are NOT cold brewing.” They would be right.
